title: MikroTik PW48V-12V150W Hot Swap power supply for CCR1072-1G-8S+, -48V, 150W
description: We are now offering a Hot Swap -48V DC telecom power supply (product code PW48V-12V150W), available to purchase separately for use with CCR1072. Simply remove one of the current power supplies and replace with the new PW48V-12V150W for -48V installations - simple and easy. You don't even need to turn off the device
